name: Finantier
description: Indonesian open finance platform focused on credit scoring and alternative financial data sharing APIs.

seo.title: Finantier — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Finantier: Indonesian open finance platform focused on credit scoring and alternative financial data sharing APIs.

when_to_use: Alternative credit scoring from open finance data in Indonesia
Bank account aggregation for Indonesian lending platforms
Financial data sharing APIs compliant with Indonesian OJK rules
Income verification for underbanked MSME credit applications
Open finance data access for SEA insurtech applications

pros: Open finance APIs tuned for local banks
cons: Country scope mostly limited to Indonesia
Competes with Brick and Ayoconnect locally
review.verdict: Reasonable Indonesia-first open finance option, but local competitors have more traction.
review.best_for: Indonesian lenders and fintechs needing alternative-data credit signals
review.not_for: Fintechs operating outside Indonesia or needing established vendor SLAs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.

lock_in.reason: Regional open finance API, data ties
